strings.noTrackLoaded: Literally crickets. Where is the beat, bestie?
strings.dragDrop: Drop that banger right here, henny!
strings.idle: Giving face, giving body, giving... nothing yet.
strings.playing: YASS! We are absolutely eating this up!
strings.paused: Hold please, I need to fix my lip gloss.
strings.stopped: The show is over, but the afterparty is forever.
strings.noSongLoaded: My playlist is as dry as your elbow, honey.
strings.dropAudioFile: Give me the tea (and the mp3)!
strings.playBlocked: OMAGAD, click me first! Don't be shy!
strings.repeatAll: Keep the party going until the sun comes up!
strings.repeatOne: Obsessed? We love a dedicated fan!
strings.importTheme: Try on a new look, gorge!
strings.uploadAudio: Lock it in the Vault of Icons
strings.designedIn: Designed with Love, Lashes, and Light
strings.seekLabel: Finding the bridge to jump off of (vibe-wise)
strings.rewindTitle: Rewind the drama (Shift+Click for 10s, Ctrl+Click for the first audition)
strings.forwardTitle: Manifesting the future (Shift+Click for 10s, Ctrl+Click for the next era)
strings.clearCacheTitle: THE TOTAL WIG SNATCH: Bestie, are you for real?! If you clear the cache, your custom looks and languages are GONE. It’s a total reboot! You’ll be back to factory-default basic! Are we really doing this?!
